metadata.title: Category to Partners Index (US Healthcare)
metadata.description: Canonical category (18 buckets per Partners xlsx 'Category Summary') -> deduplicated list of supply partners. Each partner entry keeps its original fine-grained source_category (e.g. 'Nursing (ICU/Critical Care)') for traceability while rolling up into one of the 18 canonical buckets. Used by Nova Intelligence for answers like 'list all diversity-focused healthcare partners'.

schema.value_per_key: {count: int, partners: [{name, url, status, priority, source_category, specialties, sources[]}]}
